title: Perspektive
body:
Perspektive is a Freelook/Perspective Mod for Fabric, allowing you to move your camera freely without changing your player's rotation.

Freelook can be enabled via a configurable keybind, hold and toggle keys are possible.
Camera distance can be adjusted by scrolling.

## Installation
### Fabric
1. Make sure the [Fabric Mod Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) is installed.
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), and [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin).
3. Install this mod.

### NeoForge
While this mod is written for Fabric, it can be installed on NeoForge through Sinytra Connector, as long as Sinytra Connector is available for the Minecraft version you want to play. 

Instructions: 
1. Make sure the [NeoForge Mod Loader](https://neoforged.net) is installed.
2. Install [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api), and [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin).
3. Install this mod.
